svg.title: Valkyrja exception hierarchy — Python
svg.desc: Python-specific exception hierarchy for Valkyrja. Three branches mirror PHP: BaseException for Throwable, RuntimeError for RuntimeException, and ValueError for InvalidArgumentException. Abstract enforcement via ABC.
svg.text: No checked exceptions — hierarchy is convention-enforced. Abstract via ABC raises TypeError on direct instantiation.
shared across Http · Cli · Queue etc.
concrete · one per throw site or group
Inherit from ABC alongside the language root. Attempting to instantiate raises TypeError — closest Python gets to compile-time enforcement.
ValkyrjaInvalidArgumentException extends ValueError for language-level catchability while preserving cross-port parity name.
Convention-enforced only. Document exceptions in docstrings. Type checkers (mypy, pyright) can flag unhandled exceptions with plugins.
except ContainerNotFoundException as e — Python resolves top-to-bottom, same as PHP. More specific exceptions must come first.
Exception hierarchy is identical across CGI and worker modes — no structural changes needed when switching deployment models.
